canonical_name: the court of Ban of Ben-wick
just another of the king's unregarded bastards
people who see whatever vision they will
the strange country where the fairy woman had spoken with her and had sought to foster her child
The old folk who lived on the chalk
the land of Achilles and Alexander
a fisherwoman who had seen the boats swept out to sea
the seal woman who had come out of the sea to find a mortal lover
the unmarried women who waited on the Queen
the long loft room behind the Queen's own chamber
fifth-or is it sixth-son to King Ban
son to the grove and the Great Marriage-
the Old People who dwelt here long before Rome came to us
those who do not follow Christ
the soldiers who were not wedded
the one woman in the kingdom he could not have
the stone-flagged space before the stables
the house after all honest folk
the peaceful Tribes, who wanted no more than to till their barley crops in peace and worship the Goddess
those mighty heroes of old we spoke of before
